use_cases: Hero section background with animated grid effect
Landing page visual accent with scrolling grid animation
Tech-forward dashboard background with dynamic shader effect
Modern website section with responsive WebGL grid overlay
Loading screen or transition effect with grid animation
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered scrolling grid shader component using Three.js that renders a continuously animating grid pattern on a dark background. The effect creates bright grid lines using sine and cosine functions, offset by elapsed time to produce smooth horizontal scrolling. Designed as a full-container visual element, it responds to window resize and device pixel ratio for crisp rendering across platforms.
